ddls:
CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "pidn" INTEGER /* Personal identifier number for the subject */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the subject */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the subject */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest educational qualification of the subject */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Relevant medical history of the subject */,
  "consent_date" TEXT /* Date when the subject provided consent for the study */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the subject for follow-ups */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "subject_id" TEXT /* Reference to the subject who participated in the experiment */,
  "run" INTEGER /* Run number of the experiment */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the experiment */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the experiment */,
  "word" TEXT /* Word presented during the experiment */,
  "rt" REAL /* Response time of the subject */,
  "assoc_hit" INTEGER /* Association hit indicator */,
  "ex_sp_hit" INTEGER /* Explicit spatial hit indicator */,
  "logit_vtc_x" REAL /* Logit of the visual task control measure */,
  "prob_vtc_x" REAL /* Probability of the visual task control measure */,
  "acc_vtc_x" INTEGER /* Accuracy of the visual task control measure */,
  "logit_ang_x" REAL /* Logit of the angular measure */,
  "prob_ang_x" REAL /* Probability of the angular measure */,
  "acc_ang_x" INTEGER /* Accuracy of the angular measure */,
  "logit_ang_y" REAL /* Logit of the angular measure for the y-axis */,
  "prob_ang_y" REAL /* Probability of the angular measure for the y-axis */,
  "face_uni_ang" REAL /* Face universal angular measure */,
  "place_uni_ang" REAL /* Place universal angular measure */,
  "sel_uni_ang" REAL /* Selected universal angular measure */,
  "acc_ang_y" INTEGER /* Accuracy of the angular measure for the y-axis */,
  "logit_vtc_y" REAL /* Logit of the visual task control measure for the y-axis */,
  "prob_vtc_y" REAL /* Probability of the visual task control measure for the y-axis */,
  "face_uni_vtc" REAL /* Face universal visual task control measure */,
  "place_uni_vtc" REAL /* Place universal visual task control measure */,
  "sel_uni_vtc" INTEGER /* Selected universal visual task control measure */,
  "acc_vtc_y" REAL /* Accuracy of the visual task control measure for the y-axis */,
  "ang" REAL /* Angular measure */,
  "vtc" REAL /* Visual task control measure */,
  "hc" REAL /* Hippocampal component */,
  "cadg_ant" REAL /* Anterior cingulate cortex component */,
  "ca3dg" REAL /* CA3 dorsal gyrus component */,
  "ca1" REAL /* CA1 component */,
  "sub" REAL /* Subiculum component */,
  "cadg_post" REAL /* Posterior cingulate cortex component */,
  "experiment_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was conducted */,
  "experiment_location" TEXT /* Location where the experiment was conducted */,
  "experiment_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations during the experiment */,
  "experiment_version" INTEGER /* Version of the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the experiment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the experiment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_word FOREIGN KEY ("word") REFERENCES words ("word_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_condition FOREIGN KEY ("condition") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "words" (
  "word_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each word */,
  "word" TEXT /* The word used in the experiment */,
  "part_of_speech" TEXT /* Part of speech of the word */,
  "definition" TEXT /* Definition of the word */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("word_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neural_components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neural component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the neural component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the neural component */,
  "anatomical_location" TEXT /* Anatomical location of the neural component */,
  "measuring_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure the neural component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neural_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of neural data */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment during which the data was collected */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neural component */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the neural data */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of neural data */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the neural data */,
  "data_size" TEXT /* Size of the neural data file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the neural data file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_neural_data_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_neural_data_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES neural_components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or affiliation of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment or data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment or data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment or data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID for the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment analyzed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the analysis */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the analysis */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was created */,
  "analysis_version" INTEGER /* Version of the analysis */,
  "analysis_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the analysis */,
  "analysis_status" TEXT /* Status of the analysis */,
  "completed_at" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was created */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the dataset */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the dataset */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_contents" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset content */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment included in the dataset */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the dataset content */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the dataset content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_contents_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_contents_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
